texto: To research my book 'Me the People' - in which I have rewritten the entire Constitution of the United States - I flew to Greece, the birthplace of democracy. I bused to Philly, the home of independence. I even, if you can believe it, read the Constitution of the United States.
explicacao: Citação de Kevin Bleyer sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “To research my book 'Me the People' - in which I have rewritten the entire Constitution of the Un…” articula reflexao, home, believe em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e believe.
